mapper.select: SELECT r.parking_roi_id, r.slot_id, r.image_width, r.image_height, r.roi_polygon, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, s.slot_code, s.camera_id, c.camera_name FROM biz_parking_roi r LEFT JOIN biz_parking_slot s ON r.slot_id = s.parking_slot_id LEFT JOIN dev_camera c ON s.camera_id = c.camera_id WHERE r.del_flag = '0'
